__faion_header__.purpose: Wave exit-gate record produced at the end of each of the 4 waves (PoC, parallel build, cutover, decommission). Consumed by the migration tracker and by validate-e2e-framework-migration-playbook.py.
__faion_header__.consumes: Wave entry-criteria record + parity test results + rollback runbook reference.
__faion_header__.produces: playbook-step wave record matching content/02-output-contract.xml schema.
__faion_header__.token-budget-impact: small (one record per wave, ~300 tokens filled)
